◎译　　名　上帝的小提琴手：雅沙·海菲兹
◎片　　名　God's Fiddler: Jascha Heifetz
◎年　　代　2011

◎编　　剧　莎拉·卢金森 Sara Lukinson
◎主　　演　巴迪·范霍恩 Buddy Van Horn


◎简　　介  

　　Not since Paganini had there been such a magician on the violin. Jascha Heifetz was the first truly modern virtuoso, a man about whom Itzhak Perlman said, 'When I spoke with him, I can't believe, I'm talking to God'. Heifetz was a legendary but mysterious figure whose story embodies the dual nature of artistic genius. The paradox of how a mortal man lives with immortal gifts - ...
trans_title: 上帝的小提琴手：雅沙·海菲兹
